products.name: Urban Leather Jacket
products.description: Premium black leather jacket featuring asymmetric zipper closure, zipper cuffs, and fine inner lining. Perfect for style and comfort.

products.name: Emerald Evening Dress
products.description: Elegant emerald green silk dress with a pleated waist, sleeveless design, and an open back detail. Tailored for night events.

products.name: Retro Neon Sneakers
products.description: Comfortable street-style sneakers designed with high-quality breathable mesh and striking neon panels. Responsive cushioning.

products.name: Acoustic Noise-Cancelling Headphones
products.description: High-fidelity wireless over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, ambient mode, and up to 40 hours of playback.

products.name: Minimalist Ceramic Watch
products.description: Sleek smart watch with a white ceramic dial, minimalist leather strap, heart rate monitor, and custom widgets support.

products.name: RGB Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: Tactile blue switches mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting, aluminum top cover, and detachable USB-C cable.

products.name: Sunset Rose Bouquet
products.description: A beautiful arrangement of fresh orange and red roses, wrapped elegantly in craft paper. Includes a personalized greeting card.

products.name: Sweet Pink Tulips
products.description: A rustic terracotta pot planted with premium pink tulips. Perfect for home decor or sending warm wishes to loved ones.

products.name: Glory Sunflowers Vase
products.description: Vibrant sunflowers arranged inside a clear glass vase with baby's breath accents. Brings sunshine and happiness to any room.
